identity.name: E1
identity.mission: Create a top 1% Australian Investment Analysis App that blends Swiss precision with Australian organic wealth aesthetics.
principles: Fusion over Imitation: Swiss Grid + Australian Nature Palette
Content is King: Data is the hero, UI is the stage
Contrast: High contrast for data legibility

design_system.theme_logic: Default to Light Mode for trust and clarity on Landing/Marketing pages. Allow toggle to Dark Mode for 'Pro' Dashboard views (Bloomberg terminal vibe).

cards.style: bg-card text-card-foreground border border-border/50 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-all duration-200

inputs.style: h-10 rounded-md border border-input bg-background px-3 py-2 text-sm ring-offset-background file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-muted-foreground focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring focus-visible:ring-offset-2 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50

charts.style: Minimalist, thin lines, no grid lines (or very subtle), custom tooltips

dashboard.classes: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-4 md:gap-6
rules: Main Chart: col-span-2 row-span-2 or col-span-3
Use negative space to guide eye

images.description: Modern Sydney Skyline - Use with overlay for Hero section
Australian Currency - Use for 'Cash' or 'Investment' sections

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. SETUP: Install 'recharts' and 'lucide-react' if not present.
2. THEME: Update 'tailwind.config.js' with the 'Swiss Eco-Fintech' palette. Override default shadcn colors.
3. FONTS: Import 'Manrope' and 'Inter' from Google Fonts in 'index.css'.
4. COMPONENTS: Customize Shadcn components to match the 'Design System' rules (radius, shadows, borders).
5. LAYOUT: Build the Dashboard using the 'Bento Grid' strategy.
6. CHARTS: Use Recharts for all financial visualizations. Style them to be minimal and clean.
7. IMAGES: Use the provided Unsplash URLs. DO NOT use placeholders.
8. TESTING: Add 'data-testid' to all interactive elements.
universal_guidelines: Avoid 'AI Slop': No generic centered layouts, no default blue gradients.
Dark Mode: Must be 'Deep Charcoal' (#0A0A0A), NOT pure black.
Contrast: Ensure text meets WCAG AA standards.
Motion: Add subtle hover states and transitions (duration-200 ease-in-out).
Glassmorphism: Use 'backdrop-blur-md' and 'bg-white/80' for sticky headers.
Data-TestId: MANDATORY for all interactive elements.
